hero.title: Guqula Ividiyo Enye Ibe
hero.subtitle: Ncamathisa ikhonkco okanye ulayishe ifayile — i-AI ikhuphela ngokuzenzekelayo kwaye iphinde isebenzise umxholo wakho ube ziibhlogi, imisonto yezentlalo, iincwadana zeendaba, nokunye.
hero.accent: Phinda-phinda imveliso yakho yomxholo ngokuphindwe ka-10.
hero.placeholder: Ncamathisa ikhonkco le-YouTube, ipodcast, okanye nayiphi na ividiyo...

steps.title: Ncamathisa okanye Layisha
steps.desc: Phosa ikhonkco le-YouTube, layisha ifayile yomsindo, okanye ncamathisa umbhalo. Akukho seto iyimfuneko — nqakraza nje kube kanye.

steps.title: I-AI Iyasebenza Ngomlingo
steps.desc: I-AI yethu ikhuphela kwaye iqonde umxholo wakho, emva koko iwubhale ngobukrelekrele ngokwesitayile esikhethekileyo seplatifomu nganye.

steps.title: Papasha Kuyo Yonke Indawo
steps.desc: Fumana umxholo ococekileyo we-WeChat, Twitter, LinkedIn, Xiaohongshu, iibhlogi, nokunye. Khuphela, khuphela okanye wabelane ngoko nangoko.

features.label: Iimpawu
features.title: Yonke Into Oyifunayo Ukuze
features.subtitle: Yakhelwe abadali abafuna ukwandisa umxholo ngamnye abawuvelisayo.

list.title: Ukuphinda Kubhalwe nge-AI
list.desc: Ayikokukhuphela nje — i-AI iyawuqonda umxholo kwaye iphinde ibhale ngokwelizwi kunye nefomathi ekhethekileyo yeplatifomu nganye.

list.title: Iifomathi Zokuphuma ezi-10
list.desc: Iibhlogi, imisonto ye-Twitter, izithuba ze-LinkedIn, amanqaku e-Xiaohongshu, iincwadana zeendaba, i-SRT subtitles, amanqaku e-SEO, nokunye.

list.title: Iilwimi ezingama-63+
list.desc: Khupha kwaye uvelise umxholo ngeelwimi ezingama-63+. Zilungele abadali bamazwe ngamazwe kunye nabaphulaphuli behlabathi.

list.title: Ukuveliswa Okusasazwayo
list.desc: Bona umxholo uvela unobumba ngonobumba ngexesha lokwenyani. Akusayi kuba nokulinda i-spinner.

list.title: Ukuphuculwa Ngengxoxo
list.desc: Thetha nemveliso nganye ukuyilungisa. Yithi 'yenza ibe mfutshane' okanye 'yongeza i-emoji' — i-AI iyisebenzisa ngoko nangoko.

list.title: Iifomathi Zokuthumela ezi-6
list.desc: Khuphela njenge-Markdown, TXT, PDF, DOCX, SRT, okanye CSV. Ilungele ukupapashwa ngokuthe ngqo.

list.title: Yabelana & Sebenzisana
list.desc: Velisa amakhonkco okwabelana ukuze abasebenzi bakho bakwazi ukujonga kwaye basebenzisane kumxholo.

list.title: Yabucala & Ikhuselekile
list.desc: Umxholo wakho uhlala ungowakho. Iifayile ziyacinywa ngokuzenzekelayo emva kokuqhubekeka. Akukho kugcinwa kwedatha.

list.title: Ukubhaqwa KwePlatifomu Ngobukrelekrele
list.desc: Ncamathisa ikhonkco le-YouTube? Sicebisa ibhlogi + Twitter. Ncamathisa i-Bilibili? Sicebisa i-WeChat + Xiaohongshu.

formats.outputSubtitle: Velisa yonke into ngaxeshanye — akukho mfuneko yokuqhuba isixhobo izihlandlo ezininzi.
formats.langSubtitle: Khupha kwaye uvelise umxholo ngeelwimi ezingama-63+. Zilungele abadali bamazwe ngamazwe kunye nabaphulaphuli behlabathi.

testimonials.text: "Ekugqibeleni isixhobo esiyiqondayo indlela yokusebenza yokudala umxholo. Ividiyo enye → zonke iiplatifomu kwimizuzu. Itshintshe ishedyuli yam yomxholo."
testimonials.author: Sarah Chen

testimonials.text: "Ukuphuculwa ngengxoxo kuyamangalisa. Ndiyakwazi ukulungisa imveliso nganye ngokuthetha nje nayo. Kusindisa iiyure zam qho ngeveki."
testimonials.author: Marcus Rivera

testimonials.text: "Bendithandabuza umxholo we-AI, kodwa umgangatho undimangalisile ngokwenene. Ukufomathwa okukhethekileyo kweplatifomu kuchanekile."
testimonials.author: Yuki Tanaka

testimonials.text: "Njengomseki osebenza yedwa, esi sixhobo sindinika imveliso yeqela lomxholo. Izithuba ze-LinkedIn, iibhlogi, iitweets — zonke zivela kwividiyo enye."
testimonials.author: Alex Park

pricing.label: Amaxabiso
pricing.title: Amaxabiso
pricing.subtitle: Qala simahla, phucula xa ufuna okungaphezulu. Akukho mirhumo ifihliweyo.

cta.title: Ukulungele Uku
cta.subtitle: Joyina amawaka abadali abaguqula ividiyo nganye ibe sisicwangciso esipheleleyo somxholo kwiplatifomu ezininzi. Qala simahla — akukho khadi letyala liyimfuneko.

footer.tagline: Ukuphinda usebenzise umxholo nge-AI. Guqula ividiyo enye ibe sisicwangciso sakho sonke somxholo kwiplatifomu ezininzi.
